text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't it be hilarious if I lost again? I'd be, like,
the worst ever.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But seriously, what do I even do if I lose today?
Ughhh, my heart's pounding...
choice_data_list:
Even if you're nervous, all you can do is give it
your best shot.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not, like... nervous or whatever. Well... maybe
a little...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
My best shot, huh... I guess that's all there is to it.
This stupid feeling won't disappear unless I win.
